title: Jam Hardcore
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack that improves Minecraft’s performance, stability, and visuals. Includes PlasmoVoice for voice chat, EmoteCraft for animations, and over
body:
❤️ Welcome to the Jam Hardcore modpack — a collection crafted with love for Jam Hardcore server players, but perfectly suited for anyone who values a clean and enhanced Minecraft experience.

This modpack is built on Fabric and makes the game smoother, more beautiful, and more convenient, while fully preserving the vanilla atmosphere. It’s lightweight, runs great on low-end PCs, and requires no learning curve: everything feels familiar, just works, and looks better.

# 🎮 **What’s inside?**

🔧 **Faster and More Stable**
Mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight handle performance and stability. They eliminate FPS drops and lighting issues without changing Minecraft’s visual style.

🌈 **Better Visuals with Shaders**
The modpack includes several built-in shaders that can be enabled in just a couple of clicks — no extra setup or downloads required.

📡 **Voice Chat**
PlasmoVoice adds in-game voice communication. It’s supported on servers with the mod installed, making multiplayer more lively and natural.

💃 **Animations and Emotes**
EmoteCraft lets you dance, strike poses, and even import custom animations from Blender. We’ve also included a ready-to-use SpEmotes pack, so there’s nothing to search for — everything works straight out of the box.

🏆 **Achievements with Translations**
The modpack includes BACAPED, a language pack for the BlazeandCave Advancements mod, translated into multiple languages. Over 1,000 achievements make world exploration and survival even more engaging.

✅ **Not Just for Jam Hardcore**
While the modpack is primarily designed for our server, it works great in singleplayer and on other Fabric servers. It’s compatible with most Fabric mods, isn’t overloaded, and runs smoothly even on low-end machines.
